name: Sweet Natural Trading Co. Limited
summary: Sweet Natural Trading Co. Limited produces and packages natural sweetener products. It offers coconut sugar, xylitol, lollipops, honey, bread, butter, flour, oats, chocolate bars, soda, tea, and fruit drops. The company's products are sold in approximately 7,000 stores; and to distributors. It also sells its products through sweetnaturaltrading.com. The company was formerly known as Xylitol Canada Inc. and changed its name to Sweet Natural Trading Co. Limited in December 2017. Sweet Natural Trading Co. Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in North York, Canada.
